  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    sys/dev/usb          ukbd.c usb_quirks.c usb_quirks.h usbdevs 
  Log:
  Add a quirk for devices recognized as usb keyboards not to be hooked by
  ukbd(4).

  MFC after:      1 week
